extDescription.message: Chrome shortcuts: simulated split view and tab utilities.

cmd_move_current_tab_left_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab left
Chrome: Ctrl+Shift+PgUp
Extension suggestion: Cmd+Left

cmd_move_current_tab_right_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab right
Chrome: Ctrl+Shift+PgDn
Extension suggestion: Cmd+Right

cmd_move_current_tab_first_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab to first
Extension: Not set

cmd_move_current_tab_last_desc.message:
🗂️ Move current tab to last
Extension: Not set

cmd_unload_current_tab_desc.message:
🗂️ Unload tab from memory
Extension: Not set

cmd_go_back_page_desc.message:
🧭 Go back to previous page
Extension: Alt+Left

cmd_go_forward_page_desc.message:
🧭 Go forward to next page
Extension: Alt+Right

cmd_native_split_view_desc.message:
↔️ Native Chrome Split View
Chrome: Cmd+Option+N

cmd_navigate_last_active_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Navigate to last active tab
Extension: Not set

cmd_select_first_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Select first tab
Extension: Not set

cmd_select_last_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Select last tab
Extension: Not set

cmd_toggle_pin_tab_desc.message:
🗂️ Pin / unpin current tab
Extension: Not set

cmd_toggle_mute_tab_desc.message:
🗂️ Mute / unmute current tab
Extension: Not set

cmd_search_in_background_desc.message:
🧭 Search in background
Extension: Not set

cmd_open_extension_shortcuts_desc.message:
🌐 Open Extension Shortcuts (chrome://extensions/shortcuts)
Extension: Not set

cmd_open_chrome_flags_desc.message:
🌐 Open Chrome Flags (chrome://flags)
Extension: Not set

cmd_open_chrome_help_desc.message:
🌐 Open Chrome Help (chrome://help)
Extension: Not set

cmd_memo_jump_to_specific_tab_desc.message:
🧭 Jump to specific tab
Chrome: Cmd+1 to Cmd+8, Cmd+9

cmd_memo_toggle_bookmarks_bar_desc.message:
🌐 Show or hide Bookmarks Bar
Chrome: Cmd+Shift+B

cmd_memo_open_delete_browsing_data_desc.message:
🌐 Open Delete Browsing Data
Chrome: Cmd+Shift+Delete

cmd_memo_focus_main_menu_desc.message:
🌐 Focus main menu bar
Chrome: Control+F2

cmd_memo_cycle_focus_toolbars_desc.message:
🌐 Cycle focus through dialogs and toolbars
Chrome: Cmd+Option+Up or Down

cmd_memo_save_all_tabs_as_bookmarks_desc.message:
🌐 Save all tabs as bookmarks
Chrome: Cmd+Shift+D
